name: Mokey Mokey Adrift
desc: This card's name becomes "Mokey Mokey" and is treated as a Normal Monster while face-up on the field or in the GY. You can discard this card; add 1 "Mokey Mokey" card from your Deck to your hand, except "Mokey Mokey Adrift".
mnst_eff: This card's name becomes "Mokey Mokey" and is treated as a Normal Monster while face-up on the field or in the GY. You can discard this card; add 1 "Mokey Mokey" card from your Deck to your hand, except "Mokey Mokey Adrift".
eff: This card's name becomes "Mokey Mokey" and is treated as a Normal Monster while face-up on the field or in the GY. You can discard this card; add 1 "Mokey Mokey" card from your Deck to your hand, except "Mokey Mokey Adrift".

stat_change: Changes own name while in the GY
Changes own name while on the field
